_meta.description: Knowledge base index. Agents read THIS to find the right reference file for their task. DO NOT scan the knowledge folder — use this index.
_meta.usage: 1. Check which category matches your task. 2. Read ONLY that file. 3. Copy code patterns directly — don't reinvent.

categories.frameworks: When to use which framework, install commands, project structure
categories.libraries: How to use specific libraries (shadcn, framer-motion, tailwind, R3F, GSAP, etc.)
categories.patterns: Code patterns with sample code for common tasks
categories.components-source: Pre-built component code ready to copy into projects

frameworks.framework-selection.md: Decision matrix: which framework for which project type and scope. Includes 3D website options and install commands for R3F/GSAP.
frameworks.nextjs.md: Next.js App Router patterns, file conventions, API routes, layouts
frameworks.vite-react.md: Vite + React setup, routing, build config
frameworks.expo-react-native.md: Expo + React Native setup, navigation, native APIs
frameworks.html-css-js.md: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS patterns for Simple scope projects

libraries.shadcn-ui.md: shadcn/ui install, component list, usage examples, theming
libraries.tailwind.md: Tailwind CSS utility patterns, responsive, dark mode, custom config
libraries.framer-motion.md: Animation patterns: fade, slide, scale, stagger, scroll, layout
libraries.react-three-fiber.md: React Three Fiber (R3F): Canvas setup, hooks (useFrame, useThree), geometries, materials, lighting, camera controls, events, performance, Next.js integration
libraries.drei.md: Drei helpers for R3F: Float, Environment, Text3D, ScrollControls, Stars, Sparkles, MeshDistortMaterial, MeshWobbleMaterial, Html, ContactShadows, MeshReflectorMaterial, GradientTexture, Instances
libraries.gsap-scrolltrigger.md: GSAP + ScrollTrigger: scroll animations, parallax, pinning, scrub, horizontal scroll, staggered reveals, text animation, Lenis smooth scroll, R3F integration, cleanup patterns
libraries.three-postprocessing.md: Three.js post-processing: Bloom, Vignette, ChromaticAberration, DepthOfField, Noise, GodRays, cinematic pipelines, performance tips, effect presets by aesthetic
libraries.react-hook-form.md: Form handling with validation, error display, submission
libraries.zustand.md: State management: stores, selectors, persist, devtools
libraries.prisma.md: Database ORM: schema, migrations, CRUD queries, relations
libraries.nextauth.md: Authentication: providers, session, middleware, protected routes
libraries.stripe.md: Payments: checkout, subscriptions, webhooks, customer portal
libraries.zod.md: Input validation: schemas, parsing, error messages, form integration
libraries.resend.md: Email: Resend API, React Email templates, Nodemailer fallback
libraries.charts-dataviz.md: Charts and data visualization: Recharts, shadcn Chart, Plotly, stat cards, sparklines, dashboard layouts, heatmaps, animated numbers

patterns.react-components.md: Component patterns: props, composition, conditional render, lists
patterns.api-patterns.md: API route patterns: CRUD, auth middleware, error handling, validation
patterns.data-fetching.md: Data fetching: server components, client fetch, SWR/React Query, loading states — uses semantic tokens for all states
patterns.auth-flow.md: Authentication flow: login, signup, session, protected routes, middleware
patterns.responsive-layout.md: Responsive patterns: mobile-first, breakpoints, grid, flex, container queries
patterns.dark-mode.md: Dark mode: Tailwind class strategy, system preference, toggle, persistence
patterns.seo.md: SEO patterns: metadata, sitemap, robots, Open Graph, structured data
patterns.external-api.md: External API consumption: REST client, GraphQL, proxy routes, OAuth, retry/timeout
patterns.data-sources.md: External data sources: Supabase, Firebase, Airtable, Google Sheets, Notion API
patterns.file-ingestion.md: File parsing: CSV (papaparse), JSON, Excel (SheetJS), drag-drop upload component
patterns.file-storage.md: File uploads: S3/R2 presigned URLs, direct upload, Supabase Storage, upload component
patterns.realtime.md: Realtime data: SSE, WebSocket/Socket.io, Supabase Realtime, polling, live dashboard
patterns.rate-limiting.md: Backend security: rate limiting (in-memory + Redis), CORS, security headers, input sanitization
patterns.monitoring.md: Observability: Sentry error tracking, structured logging, health checks, Web Vitals
patterns.plugin-memory.md: Plugin internals: SQLite persistent memory schema, cross-project tracking, session history
patterns.ui-ux-principles.md: THE design bible — typography, spacing, color tokens, hierarchy, buttons, cards, forms, accessibility, micro-interactions. READ THIS BEFORE ANY UI WORK.
patterns.design-system.md: How to create rich design systems — globals.css tokens, tailwind.config.ts setup, color presets, HSL system, gradients, shadows, animations
patterns.security-frontend.md: Frontend security: XSS prevention, CSRF tokens, input validation (client+server), secure data handling, CSP headers, debounce/throttle, file upload validation, auth UI security, env variable safety
patterns.error-handling.md: Unified error handling: error boundaries (route + global), API error format, fetch wrapper, toast-on-error, retry with backoff, form errors (field + server), DataView 3-state component, HTTP status mapping
patterns.loading-states.md: Complete skeleton patterns: card, table, list, form, profile, hero, dashboard, stat card skeletons. Base Skeleton component. Next.js loading.tsx files. Rules for matching content shape.
patterns.3d-scenes.md: 3D scene composition: floating objects, morphing blobs, reflective floors, wireframe neon, glass materials, animated grids. Copy-paste R3F scene recipes.
patterns.particle-systems.md: Particle effects: floating particles, rising embers, wave grids, galaxy spirals, network graphs, snow/rain. Instanced meshes for performance.
patterns.scroll-driven-3d.md: Scroll + 3D: GSAP ScrollTrigger with R3F camera paths, object reveals, material morphing, parallax 3D layers, section-triggered animations.
patterns.glassmorphism.md: Modern CSS effects: glassmorphism cards, mesh gradients, noise overlays, glow/neon, gradient borders, dot/line grids, spotlight effects, mouse-following highlights.
patterns.3d-hero-sections.md: Hero section patterns: floating object hero, particle field hero, wireframe + bloom neon hero, glass sphere hero, starfield galaxy hero. Mobile fallbacks + reduced motion.

components-source.button.md: Button component with 8 variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, destructive, link, gradient, glass), sizes, loading state, icon slots, MotionButton — copy-paste ready
components-source.input.md: Input component with label, error, helper text, password toggle, character count, loading, icon slots, sizes, Textarea — copy-paste ready
components-source.select.md: Select/dropdown with keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape), ARIA roles (combobox, listbox, option), error state, sizes — copy-paste ready
components-source.card.md: Card component with 7 variants (default, elevated, muted, interactive, glass, featured, gradient), image, badge, actions — copy-paste ready
components-source.modal.md: Modal/dialog with backdrop, focus trap, keyboard (Escape), sizes, preventClose — copy-paste ready
components-source.data-table.md: Data table with sort, filter, search, pagination, loading/empty/error states — copy-paste ready
components-source.navbar.md: Responsive navbar with mobile menu, glass variant — copy-paste ready
components-source.sidebar.md: Collapsible sidebar for dashboards — copy-paste ready
components-source.toast.md: Toast notification system (Sonner) with success/error/warning/info variants — copy-paste ready
components-source.form.md: Complete form with react-hook-form + zod validation, field wrapper, section divider — copy-paste ready
components-source.auth-pages.md: Login + Signup pages with split-screen layout, social login, password strength — copy-paste ready
components-source.badge.md: Badge/tag component with 7 variants (default, secondary, success, warning, destructive, outline, muted), removable, sizes — copy-paste ready
components-source.tabs.md: Tabs component with 3 variants (underline, pills, enclosed), keyboard navigation, ARIA roles (tablist, tab, tabpanel), badge support — copy-paste ready
components-source.alert.md: Alert/banner component with 4 variants (info, success, warning, error), dismissible, action slot, ARIA role=alert — copy-paste ready
components-source.3d-scene.md: Reusable 3D scene container with lighting, environment, loading state, reduced-motion fallback, dynamic import — copy-paste ready
components-source.particle-background.md: Particle background component with presets (ambient, dense, sparse, galaxy, rain), mobile-aware count, reduced-motion fallback — copy-paste ready
components-source.scroll-3d-hero.md: Scroll-driven 3D hero with GSAP camera path, floating objects, mobile gradient fallback, CTA buttons — copy-paste ready
components-source.glassmorphism-card.md: Glassmorphism card with variants (default, frosted, subtle, bordered, glow), hover states, glass navbar — copy-paste ready
